query: ABS guidelines intermediate risk prostate brachytherapy I-125 prescription dose target coverage

results.title: ABS brachytherapy consensus guidelines.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 22265433. 2012/01/01 00:00. PURPOSE: Representatives from the Gynecologic Groupe European de 
Curietherapie-European Society for Radiation Therapy and Oncology (GYN 
GEC-ESTRO), the American Brachytherapy Society (ABS), and the Canadian 
Brachytherapy Group (CBG) met to develop international consensus recommendations 
for target definitions for image-guided adaptive brachytherapy for vaginal 
recurrences of endometrial or cervical cancer.
METHODS AND MATERIALS: Seventeen radiation onc
